title: 2025/10/16 - PP
description: Thursday, 16 October 2025 | Primary Production Review briefing on the 2023/24 annual review of Crown Irrigation Investments Limited Crown Irrigation Investments Ltd Murray Gribben, Chief Executive
descriptionSummary: Primary Production. Review briefing on the 2023/24 annual review of Crown Irrigation Investments Limited. Crown Irrigation Investments Ltd
